title: Hisuian Typhlosion Battle Guide
summary: A [Fire]/[Ghost] special attacker whose signature [infernal-parade] doubles damage against statused targets — 119 SpA and [Normal]/[Fighting] immunity.
weaknesses: 95 Speed is outsped by top threats
bodyMarkdown:
## Overview
Hisuian Typhlosion is a [Fire]/[Ghost] special attacker built around its signature move [infernal-parade] — a base 60 BP [Ghost] STAB that doubles against statused targets and has a 30% burn chance. With 119 Special Attack and immunity to [Normal] and [Fighting], it pivots into [urshifu] and [kangaskhan-mega] safely.

## Strengths
[infernal-parade] effectively becomes 120 BP on burned, paralyzed, or poisoned targets — an easy double damage amp when paired with status setters. [Fire]/[Ghost] is an uncommon typing that dodges [Normal] and [Fighting] moves outright. [fire-blast] + [focus-blast] covers most common defensive types.

## Weaknesses & Answers
Five weaknesses — [Water], [Rock], [Ground], [Dark], [Ghost] — plus mirror-match parity with other [Ghost] attackers. Bulk is average, and 95 Speed is outsped by common scarfers.

## Recommended Moveset
[infernal-parade] is the signature STAB. [fire-blast] is the backup [Fire] STAB. [focus-blast] handles [Dark] and [Rock] walls. [protect] is standard.

## Item · Ability · Tera
[choice-specs] maximizes damage. [life-orb] keeps flexibility. [blaze] is standard. Tera [Ghost] stacks [infernal-parade]; Tera [Fire] stacks [fire-blast].

## Teammates & Synergy
Pair with [will-o-wisp] or [toxic] users to reliably trigger the [infernal-parade] double damage. Cover [Water] and [Rock] with [Electric] and [Grass] partners. [tailwind] support handles the Speed issue.

## Play Patterns
Wait for a status to land on the opposing field, then pivot in and click [infernal-parade] for guaranteed 2x damage. Use [fire-blast] on [Steel] and [Grass] walls. Switch out against [Water] or [Dark] attackers.
